papers.title: CoCo-InEKF: State Estimation with Learned Contact Covariances in Dynamic, Contact-Rich Scenarios
papers.summary: CoCo-InEKF通过可微分的 invariant EKF 与端到端训练的轻量神经网络学习连续接触协方差，替代传统二元接触状态，实现对高动态接触场景的鲁棒状态估计。

papers.title: Before the Body Moves: Learning Anticipatory Joint Intent for Language-Conditioned Humanoid Control
Real-Time Whole-Body Teleoperation of a Humanoid Robot Using IMU-Based Motion Capture with Sim2Sim and Sim2Real Validation
papers.summary: 本论文提出使用IMU动捕服装实现对Unitree G1人形机器人的实时全身遥操作，通过自定义运动处理和运动学重定向管道，无需学习组件即可实现低延迟运动映射，并完成sim2sim到sim2real的验证。

papers.title: Cooperative Robotics Reinforced by Collective Perception for Traffic Moderation
papers.summary: 本文创新引入合作人形机器人作为主动交通管理员，通过融合基础设施双摄像头视觉与V2X通信的双感知路径，在NLOS交叉口执行人类般的STOP手势物理阻止车辆，解决传统V2X/集体感知无法影响未连接车辆的安全痛点。

papers.title: Mapping Embodied Affective Touch Strategies on a Humanoid Robot
papers.summary: 本研究让32名参与者在配备全身分布式触觉传感器的iCub机器人上，在三种约束条件下表达8种情绪，系统揭示了身体区域与空间约束如何共同塑造情感触摸的位置选择与动态特征。

companyNews.title: Hong Kong-listed robotics concept stocks rose against the market trend, with Tesla's Optimus V3 expected to debut mid-year, as the robotics industry enters a phase of mass production competition. - 富途牛牛
companyNews.summary: Tesla Optimus V3预计年中发布，香港

companyNews.title: Video Of Tesla Optimus Robot Falling To The Ground Goes Viral - BroBible
companyNews.summary: Tesla Optimus机器人在演示中摔倒视频走红，显示双足机器人平衡控制技术仍存挑战。此事件暴露人形机器人安全性和稳定性是行业关键难题，需持续研发突破。

companyNews.title: Silicon Valley's Latest Binge-Watch Is a Humanoid Warehouse Worker - Business Insider
Figure Humanoid Robots Sort Packages Non-Stop in 24/7 Demo - TechRepublic
companyNews.summary: Figure AI展示人形机器人24/7不间断分拣包裹能力，验证了类人机器人在物流仓储领域的实用价值，为替代重复性体力劳动带来商业化前景。

companyNews.title: Figure AI Humanoid Robots Work 8-Hour Shifts, Self-Charge in Live Stream - Seoul Economic Daily
companyNews.summary: Figure AI人形机器人实现连续8小时自主工作与充电，显示续航技术突破，对商业化部署具有里程碑意义。
